name: C-11 agent references EU AI Act and SOC2 in the model_rationale per the architecture cross-framework reasoning
command: grep -qE 'EU AI Act|eu-ai-act' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-compliance.md" && grep -qiE 'SOC2|soc-2|soc2-tsc' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-compliance.md" && echo ok 1>&2
